diff: Expected 1 L3+ lesson; actual 1 L3 lesson. Distillation n=4: S445a(L-1062,L3), S445b(L-1066,L3), S446-concurrent(L-1069,L2), S446-this(L-1070,L3). L3+ rate=3/4=75%. Bonus: enforcement audit fixed 5 lesson wirings not planned.
